evals.prompt: Capture this — what if I built a simple tool that emails Caterspares clients a monthly health score for their account? Like a mini report card showing orders, spend trend, and whether they're overdue anything.
evals.expected_output: A filed confirmation with title, domain (crm-client-work), tags, link to caterspares-crm project, and the single follow-up question. File saved to raw/.

evals.prompt: Don't let me forget — look into whether AMD suppliers are publicly traded. If NVDA wins, the people making their chips win too. There might be a play there.
evals.expected_output: Filed as a trading/investing idea with tags around AI, supply chain, AMD/NVDA. Domain: trading-money. Single follow-up question asked.

evals.prompt: Park this: I keep meaning to find a good photography spot near the Peak District for golden hour. Something with open moorland and a decent foreground.
evals.expected_output: Filed as an adventures/interests idea. Short title. Domain: adventures-interests. Tags around photography, travel. Single follow-up question.
